page.title: Template:Country data Crown Colony of North Borneo

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Crown Colony of North Borneo]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Crown Colony of North Borneo]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Crown Colony of North Borneo | shortname alias = North Borneo | flag alias = Flag of North Borneo (1948–1963).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of North Borneo (1948–1963).svg | flag alias-1946 = Flag of the United Kingdom (1-2).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = 1946 | redir1 = | redir2 = | related1 = Sabah | related2 = North Borneo </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude> [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = Crown Colony of North Borneo | shortname alias = North Borneo | flag alias = Flag of North Borneo (1948–1963).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of North Borneo (1948–1963).svg | flag alias-1946 = Flag of the United Kingdom (1-2).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2 = 1946 | redir1 = | redir2 = | related1 = Sabah | related2 = North Borneo </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Crown_Colony_of_North_Borneo here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
